title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Accenture India Global Group are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
